---
title: "differ.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/skills_db/cachebro/packages/sdk/src/differ.ts"
loc: 120
complexity: 28
logic_score: 1.45
style_score: 3.88
intel_score: 7.67
overall_score: 4.33
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 1.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 7.7/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 1 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
Minimal internal dependencies.

### Exports
- `computeDiff`
- `computeDiff`
- `oldLines`
- `newLines`
- `lcs`
- `hunks`
- `oldIdx`
- `newIdx`
- `lcsIdx`
- `linesChanged`
- `rawLines`
- `changedNewLines`
- `CONTEXT`
- `hunkGroups`
- `currentHunk`
- `lastChangeIdx`
- `i`
- `line`
- `c`
- `c`
- `contextEnd`
- `c`
- `firstLine`
- `lastLine`
- `prefix`
- `header`
- `longestCommonSubsequence`
- `m`
- `n`
- `dp`
- `i`
- `j`
- `result`
- `i`
